/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitor.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libhyprlandmonitor.so -o libhyprlandmonitor.so CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitor.dir/hyprlandmonitor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitor.dir/hyprlandmonitor_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitor.dir/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_HyprlandMonitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hyprlandmonitor.dir/hyprlandmonitor.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.0
